The '''Nimat Corridor''' was a minor [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] crossing the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]. The [[Annoo system/Legends|Annoo system]] was on this route.
